descriptionEn: Welcome! This is your first feature card.
notes:
# How to use this page

This board tracks features and ideas for the Taskbar Media Player project.

## Basics

- **Add a feature** — click the **+** button in the top right.
- **Mark as done** — click the circle on the left edge of a card.
- **Open notes** — click anywhere else on the card to open this panel.
- **Switch language** — click the **EN / RU** button to change the display language.
- **Filter** — use the *In Progress / Done* tabs to switch views.
- **Layout** — switch between card and list view with the layout buttons.

## Writing notes

This editor supports basic markdown:

- **bold**, *italic*, ~~strikethrough~~
- `inline code` and ``` code blocks ```
- [links](https://example.com)
- lists, headers, and `---` dividers

Click **Edit** to write, then **Save** to persist your changes to GitHub.
